title: jurinea sangardensis
intro: Jurinea sangardensis is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to Central Asia, and is also known as Sangar Jurinea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Jurinea sangardensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. In traditional herbal medicine, Jurinea sangardensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and has also been used to make tinctures and other medicinal extracts.
